description: Create a weekly GitHub Actions workflow that runs every Sunday at 1400 UTC. The workflow should have two jobs: darglint and build_posix. The darglint job runs on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.8, installing dependencies and running nox darglint. The build_posix job runs on ubuntu-latest and macos-latest with Python 3.6, 3.7, and 3.8 in parallel, installing dependencies and running nox with specific settings.
